channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish bags dumped in the woodland along London Road, 11th April
item.description:
Several large plastic bags of rubbish have been dumped in the woodland, in view of the foot path that runs inside the park, opposite the houses along London Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 11th April
item.description:
Torridon Road opposite library. Remove graffiti from bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Torridon Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Fly tipped on Bazalgette Way, London, 11th April
item.description:
I would like to report a significant fly-tipping incident located on the curve of Bazalgette Way. The pile consists of a large amount of Howdens-branded cardboard packaging and several full black bin bags. The waste is dumped against the perimeter fence and is partially obstructing the roadway. Please see the attached photo for the exact scale and contents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bazalgette Way, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amount of empty cans and unpleasant bottles dumped in woods along the footpath next to the gasometers concrete fence.., 11th April
item.description:
Over a hundred empty alcohol cans and numerous plastic bottles full of urine have been dumped in the woodland verge and along the pathway that runs through the woods alongside the concrete fence next to the old gasometers. These have built up over time as presumably this is a regular 'meeting place' !

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th April
item.description:
This spot is absolutely disgusting all the time

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tottenham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree Roots raising pavement, 11th April
item.description:
Tree roots have grown / swollen and lifted pavement making a trip hazard for pedestrians particularly aged or poor sighted. Has been this way for a long time but recently more pronounced
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 79, Scott's Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall and bins, 11th April
item.description:
Please remove also on green bins and shutters of Nero.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10;12, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 169 willesden lane, 11th April
item.description:
TV stand flytipped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Flytipping, 11th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cancell Road, Oval, Greater London

item.title: Dumped suitcase, 11th April
item.description:
Dumped suitcase on the cor er of Oaklands Road / London Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oaklands Road, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Road traffic collision debris, 11th April
item.description:
Accident last week - car was a right off and gore brigade cutting bonnet off has left debris in gutter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant flytipping in Durfey Place, 11th April
item.description:
Flytipping in Durfey Place remains a constant issue. I have already raised this within several complaints. It is now happening almost every day, and it continues to have a real impact on residents. Ms Sophia Opoku-Addo, Resident Services Officer for this area, never replied to any emails about the issue and the working group set up by her predecessor. This is simply unacceptable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Sam King Walk, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three bin bags dumped outside our house, 11th April
item.description:
Big bags of rubbish dumped outside our house and been ripped into by foxes, leaving dirty nappies etc on the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Roydene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Around 48 Christchurch avenue, 11th April
item.description:
Mattress flytipped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christchurch Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Open Rubbish has been dump, 11th April
item.description:
Not been collected or it’s continuing throwing rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marsh Hill, Hackney, London

item.title: Damaged cycle hoop, 11th April
item.description:
Backed into and bent, needs replacing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Hillyard Street, Oval, Greater London

item.category: Pavement Defect (uneven surface / cracked paving slab)

item.title: Fly-tipping in rear alleyway blocking garage access, 11th April
item.description:
Fly-tipped rubbish in rear alleyway behind DA16 2QT. Photos attached. This needs investigation because it is preventing access to garages and may attract vermin. Please investigate and arrange removal

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Montrose Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pile of dog fouling on public footway, 11th April
item.description:
Large pile of dog fouling on public footway outside 48 Nursery Avenue at the junction with Belvedere Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Nursery Avenue, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
